title: Sheeting Line
content:
Sheeting Line

Our sheeting lines are engineered to transform dough into a continuous dough band through gentle treatment. By avoiding the heavy mechanical stress of traditional dividing, this process maximizes the protection of the dough cellular structure. It is the ideal solution for high-hydration products that require a superior open-crumb texture, such as baguette, ciabatta, pizza, doughnut, toast and tin bread.

title: Company Profile
content:
![Company Profile](https://bakerylines-en.com/about/about-us_01.webp)

Beijing Zhongli Machinery Science & Technology Company (UIM) was established in 2007 and focuses on the development, manufacturing, and sales of bakery equipment, as well as providing integrated intelligent bakery production solutions. We offer a wide range of bakery production lines covering products such as toast bread, pizza, croissants, egg tarts, doughnuts, pies, bagels, baguettes, laminated pastries, burger and hot dog buns, European-style bread, and flatbread, supporting different types of industrial bakery production.

UIM operates a manufacturing facility of over 18,000 square meters and employs more than 200 staff, including over 40 engineers dedicated to research and development. We hold more than 100 patents and have built long-term cooperation with customers in more than 3,000 projects worldwide, following a customer-focused service approach to deliver practical and reliable solutions.

To date, UIM has served over 3,000 customers globally, with bakery dough forming equipment supplied across domestic and international markets including Indonesia, Vietnam, Malaysia, the United States, Canada, South Korea, Mongolia, Thailand, Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, Spain, Brazil, and South Africa. With stable equipment performance and ongoing after-sales support, we have established long-term partnerships with food manufacturers and industry partners both domestically and internationally.

Why Choose UIM?

title: Customer Cases
content:
Supporting Tanghe Food in building a 20,000-ton automated bakery production base

- Background
 Tanghe Food (Kunshan) has an annual output value of approximately RMB 500 million, focusing on mainstream bakery products such as toast bread and croissants.

- Solution
 UIM provided a fully automated laminated pastry production line tailored to the customer’s production requirements.

- Results
 The production line supports an annual capacity of 20,000 tons. With the implementation of UIM equipment, Tanghe Food achieved large-scale production of 33 million packs of toast and 1.5 million cases of frozen dough per year, significantly improving production efficiency and product consistency. The project demonstrates our ability to scale production while maintaining stable product quality across high-volume output.

Supporting the Ethiopia National Bread Factory project

- Background
 This project is a major public initiative led by the Office of the First Lady of Ethiopia. The first flagship factory is located in Addis Ababa, covering an area of 6,000 square meters.

- Solution
 UIM provided a fully automated bakery production line solution to support large-scale bread production.

- Results
 The facility is capable of processing 72 tons of flour per day while producing up to 1 million pieces of bread daily. Based on the success of this project, the government plans to replicate similar factories across 10 major cities in Ethiopia. This project highlights our capability in delivering large-scale, high-output bakery solutions for national-level infrastructure projects.
